title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, April 14 2026
summary:
Main
Bulkers: Bulker sale and purchase activity was healthy this week, with ten vessels transacting across the Kamsarmax,Panamax, Supramax, and Handysize segments, reflecting continued buyer appetite across the size spectrum. Evidence of soft pricing among mid-age and vintage Panamax and Handysize vessels resulted in dips to our values. Panamax Xin Dong Guan 13 (76,100 DWT, 2012, Hudong) sold by Dongguan Haichang for USD 15.2 mil, VV Value USD 15.6 mil
Supramax Mercury Ocean (53,500 DWT, 2008, Iwagi Zosen) sold SS/DD Due to Chinese buyers for USD 13 mil, VV Value USD 13.3 mil
Handysizes COSCO Kunlunshan (32,000 DWT, 2010, Fujian Mawei) and Jin Wang Ling (31,800 DWT, 2010, Guangzhou Huangpu) sold in an enbloc deal by COSCO Shipping Bulk for USD 16.4 mil, VV Value USD 18.3 mil
Tankers: Despite the fluctuation in earnings this week, Tanker values held their firming trend across all segments.
